LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF THE COURT'S DEC-03-07 RULING GRANTING PETITIONER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: RESPONDENT AUBURN GAREN & LANDSCAPE'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF THE COURT'S DEC-03-07 RULING GRANTING PETITIONER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED FROM DEC-17-2007 TO DEC-28-2007, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT COURTESY COPY OF REPLY PAPERS AND OPPOSING PARTY TO SUBMIT COURTESY COPY OF OPPOSING PAPERS PER LOCAL RULE 2.6(B). THE COURT IS AWARE THAT AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME WAS GRANTED FOR THIS MOTION, HOWEVER, SINCE NEITHER PARTY HAS PROVIDED THE REQUIRED COURTESY COPIES, THE COURT CANNOT HEAR THE MOTION AS CURRENTLY SCHEDULED. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077

LAW AND MOTION 301, RESPONDENT AUBURN GAREN & LANDSCAPE'S PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD. PETITION TO CONFIRM DENIED. PETITION TO VACATE GRANTED.
